events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: EMT bending & installation, commercial project, rough-complete. Observed field condition: >360° of bends between pull points. NEC Article 358 governs EMT. NEC 358.26 states that there shall be no more than the equivalent of four quarter bends (360 degrees total) between pull points. So >360° is non-compliant. Decision: fail. Risk: medium-high (could damage conductors during pulling, make it impossible to pull). Component conditions: non-compliant, installed-defective. Percent complete: rough-complete, maybe 85%. Value: 360 (the max allowed degrees). Confidence high.
